prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-PPECRG-LG-GRN-5 Product Type: PRETEND_PLAY_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kid Fun Existing Title: Pretend Play Electronic Cash Register Toy Realistic Actions and Sounds Description: Ready set shop. This multi functional cash register is perfect for teaching your child basic math and money counting skills, while allowing them pretend play they are at a real supermarket.

Cash Register has all of the elements of being a real cashier including a movable conveyor belt, working cash drawer, card swiper, barcode scanner, intercom speaker, and microphone.

For pretend shopping this set includes a basket with grocery items and play credit card so your child can mimic your grocery shopping at home.

Cash register include calculator so you child can add up their purchases. Play money is part of this set which will help your child to learn basic addition, subtraction, and cash handling skills. Search Terms: cash register fisher price cashier toy cash register with scanner cash register for kids Features: - Educational Learning Kids Cash Register Teaches Boys and Girls About Math and Money. Early Developmental Importance - Help Your Child to Learn Basic Addition, Subtraction, and Cash Handling Skills - Includes Play Money and Credit Cards - Features Movable Conveyor Belt, Working Cash Drawer, Card Swiper, Barcode Scanner, Intercom Speaker, and Microphone - Ages 3 and up === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kid Fun Electronic Cash Register Toy with Scanner
